alerts.title: Canada Border — Active
alerts.body: US–Canada trade war (Mar 4, 2025). 35% tariff on non-CUSMA goods as of Aug 1, 2025. Border delays and customs complexity.
alerts.note: → Route directly to US ports. Avoid Canadian transshipment hubs.

alerts.title: Red Sea / Suez — Closed
alerts.body: Houthi attacks ongoing since Nov 2023. 75% drop in Suez canal traffic. All major carriers rerouted via Cape of Good Hope.
alerts.note: → Adds 10–14 days + significant cost uplift to affected routes.

notes: Edit this file to update tracker alerts. Set active:false to hide an alert without deleting it. Run tracker_update.py (or tracker_update.bat) to push changes live.
